name: Amminus Gregori
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male. Wears a Cheydinhal cuirass with matching shield and guard helmet, along with chainmail boots, gauntlets, and greaves. Armed with a silver longsword.
Race: Imperial
Personality Keywords: dutiful, vigilant
Role: Member of the Cheydinhal City Guard. When an Oblivion Gate opens outside the city, he is assigned to keep watch on it to ensure nothing dangerous emerges from it.
Home Location Information: Stationed outside Cheydinhal near the Oblivion Gate when it appears.
author: Bethesda
